Title: BFS Traversal Order
Description:
Given an undirected graph with N nodes and E edges, perform BFS from node 1. On ties, visit the smaller-numbered neighbor first.

First line: N and E. Next E lines: edge u v.

**Constraints:**
- 1 <= N <= 100,000, 0 <= E <= 300,000
- Graph is connected
- Expected complexity: O(N + E)
